tasks.title: App Marketing OS: connect generated backlog to Mission Control weekly
tasks.description:
First action: Run `python3 scripts/app_marketing_task_generator.py --execute` and inspect `memory/app-marketing/generated-mission-control-tasks.json`.

Why it matters: The OS already has strategy, metrics, SEO, directory, and experiment files, but no autonomous task-board sync layer means optimal actions stay buried in markdown.

Done looks like: The generator creates deduped Mission Control tasks with first action, why, done state, owner, priority, and source references; weekly review runs it after updating metrics/experiments.

References:
- scripts/app_marketing_task_generator.py
- memory/app-marketing/os-spec.md
- docs/agents/task-board-rules.md

Guardrail: Do not create duplicate tasks; skip done/archived items and never submit externally without JT approval.
tasks.reason: The OS already has strategy, metrics, SEO, directory, and experiment files, but no autonomous task-board sync layer means optimal actions stay buried in markdown.

tasks.title: Vista: submit first durable directory listing from existing pack
tasks.description:
First action: Open `memory/app-marketing/directory-packs-vista.md`, pick 3-5 screenshots from `~/projects/jtsomwaru-com/public/images/vista/`, then submit Vista to Uneed first.

Why it matters: Vista is live and already has a precision-rating SEO page; a durable listing/backlink compounds while TikTok/ReelFarm metrics are still thin.

Done looks like: One Vista listing is submitted, the submitted URL is pasted back, and `memory/app-marketing/directory-submissions.md` is updated with status + URL.

References:
- memory/app-marketing/directory-packs-vista.md
- memory/app-marketing/directory-submissions.md
- memory/app-marketing/seo-briefs-vista-1-100-movie-rating-app.md

Guardrail: No paid submissions without approval. Do not overclaim; position Vista as precise/private taste tracking, not a Letterboxd replacement for everyone.
tasks.reason: Vista is live and already has a precision-rating SEO page; a durable listing/backlink compounds while TikTok/ReelFarm metrics are still thin.

tasks.title: Vista: add App Store vendor number for reporting metrics
tasks.description:
First action: Securely add `APPSTORE_VENDOR_NUMBER` to the approved env/config surface, then run `python3 scripts/app_marketing_connectors/app_store_metrics.py` and `python3 scripts/app_marketing_collect_metrics.py`.

Why it matters: Vista App Store metadata auth works and connector readiness exists, but Apple sales/reporting metrics require vendor number/reporting permission before downloads or product-page metrics can flow into the scoreboard.

Done looks like: `memory/app-marketing/app-store-metrics-status.json` reports `reporting_status: sales_report_ready` or a precise Apple-side permission/agreement blocker; Vista App Store rows appear in `memory/app-marketing/metrics-inbox.jsonl` when reporting is available.

References:
- memory/app-marketing/app-store-metrics-status.json
- memory/app-marketing/analytics-access-needed.md
- scripts/app_marketing_connectors/app_store_metrics.py

Guardrail: Never paste Apple private key contents, vendor number, or account secrets into docs/chat; if Apple-side agreement/role changes are required, stop and create a one-time JT action.
tasks.reason: Vista App Store metadata auth works and connector readiness exists, but Apple sales/reporting metrics require vendor number/reporting permission before downloads or product-page metrics can flow into the scoreboard.

tasks.title: Vista: run ASO baseline and one metadata/screenshot test recommendation
tasks.description:
First action: Capture current Vista App Store title, subtitle, first 3 screenshots, description first 3 lines, and compare against Letterboxd/IMDb/Serializd/indie movie trackers.

Why it matters: Vista is an App Store product; ASO is a durable acquisition lever that does not depend on ReelFarm cold starts.

Done looks like: A short ASO report is saved under `memory/app-marketing/vista-aso-baseline-YYYY-MM-DD.md` with one metadata test and one screenshot test JT can apply.

References:
- memory/app-marketing/aso-checklist.md
- memory/app-marketing/app-registry.md

Guardrail: Do not change App Store Connect directly unless JT explicitly approves.
tasks.reason: Vista is an App Store product; ASO is a durable acquisition lever that does not depend on ReelFarm cold starts.

tasks.title: Vista: schedule one clean rating-precision ReelFarm test and require metrics capture
tasks.description:
First action: Use Experiment Calendar item `Vista rating precision retest` to queue exactly one specific-movie/exact-rating slideshow in JT's ReelFarm setup.

Why it matters: Prior data says rating precision beat vague hooks; the OS needs one clean test with captured metrics before increasing volume.

Done looks like: One Vista ReelFarm post is queued/posted, then views/saves/comments are logged into `memory/app-marketing/post-registry.jsonl` or metrics inbox within 72 hours.

References:
- memory/app-marketing/experiment-calendar.md
- memory/app-marketing/weekly-scoreboard.md
- memory/reelfarm/vista-automation-a-current.md
- memory/reelfarm/vista-automation-b-current.md

Guardrail: JT laptop/ReelFarm owns posting execution. Eve must not duplicate TikTok automation on the Mac mini.
tasks.reason: Prior data says rating precision beat vague hooks; the OS needs one clean test with captured metrics before increasing volume.

tasks.title: Nash Satoshi: submit first methodology-backed directory listing
tasks.description:
First action: Open `memory/app-marketing/directory-packs-nash-satoshi.md`, verify the live methodology/trust URL, select screenshots, then submit to Uneed or Futurepedia first.

Why it matters: Nash has a methodology page and needs durable discovery beyond volatile crypto social reach.

Done looks like: One Nash listing is submitted, URL is pasted back, and directory tracking is updated.

References:
- memory/app-marketing/directory-packs-nash-satoshi.md
- memory/app-marketing/seo-pages/nash-satoshi-methodology-page.md
- memory/app-marketing/directory-submissions.md

Guardrail: No return, price prediction, or financial-performance claims. Frame as game-theory/narrative/incentive analysis.
tasks.reason: Nash has a methodology page and needs durable discovery beyond volatile crypto social reach.

tasks.title: Nash Satoshi: create one live-ranking model-disagreement post only if current data exists
tasks.description:
First action: Fetch live Nash rankings and identify one concrete model disagreement, rank movement, or updated token detail before drafting.

Why it matters: The experiment calendar says specific rankings/model updates beat abstract methodology explainers; generic crypto content is a waste.

Done looks like: A post draft is created only if live token/rank/model evidence exists; otherwise the slot is marked skipped with `NO_LIVE_RANKING_SIGNAL`.

References:
- memory/app-marketing/experiment-calendar.md
- memory/app-marketing/app-registry.md
- https://nashsatoshi.com/rankings

Guardrail: No links in X body by default, no return claims, no vague question prompts.
tasks.reason: The experiment calendar says specific rankings/model updates beat abstract methodology explainers; generic crypto content is a waste.

tasks.title: Glow Index: fix/verify crawler access for sitemap, llms.txt, rankings, and categories
tasks.description:
First action: Run `python3 scripts/glow_crawler_check.py` to capture the current blocker; then use `memory/app-marketing/glow-crawler-access-2026-05-13.md` to add narrow Cloudflare/Replit skip rules for `/robots.txt`, `/sitemap.xml`, `/llms.txt`, `/rankings`, `/categories`, and `/categories/*`.

Why it matters: Read-only checks found 403 Cloudflare challenges on Glow discovery/category routes; AI/search visibility fails if crawlers cannot reach sitemap, llms.txt, or category pages.

Done looks like: `python3 scripts/glow_crawler_check.py` exits 0 and `memory/app-marketing/glow-crawler-access-status.json` shows all six URLs `ok: true`; update the report with verified results.

References:
- memory/app-marketing/glow-crawler-access-2026-05-13.md
- memory/app-marketing/durable-discovery-plan.md
- memory/app-marketing/pseo-geo-module-spec-glow-index.md

Guardrail: Do not expand programmatic pages until crawler access and safe-claim templates are healthy.
tasks.reason: Read-only checks found 403 Cloudflare challenges on Glow discovery/category routes; AI/search visibility fails if crawlers cannot reach sitemap, llms.txt, or category pages.

tasks.title: Glow Index: prepare first safe directory submission with screenshots selected
tasks.description:
First action: Open `memory/app-marketing/directory-packs-glow-index.md`, select safe screenshots, and choose first target: Uneed or Futurepedia.

Why it matters: Glow is live and has active SEO/GEO opportunity, but listings need safe consumer-research framing and visual assets.

Done looks like: First Glow listing is ready for final approval or submitted if JT approves; directory tracking is updated with URL/status.

References:
- memory/app-marketing/directory-packs-glow-index.md
- memory/app-marketing/directory-submissions.md
- memory/app-marketing/app-registry.md

Guardrail: No medical, dermatology, diagnosis/treatment, fake testimonial, before/after, or guaranteed outcome claims.
tasks.reason: Glow is live and has active SEO/GEO opportunity, but listings need safe consumer-research framing and visual assets.

tasks.title: Glow Index: define metrics source before any TikTok/ReelFarm volume
tasks.description:
First action: Add one concrete Glow metrics source to `memory/app-marketing/account-map.json` using `memory/app-marketing/web-analytics-mapping-template.md`, then run `python3 scripts/app_marketing_connectors/web_metrics.py` and `python3 scripts/app_marketing_collect_metrics.py`.

Why it matters: Glow should not receive social volume until there is a way to measure visits/searches/clicks and learn from it.

Done looks like: `memory/app-marketing/web-analytics-status.json` shows `glow-index` removed from `blocked_products` or a precise provider/permission/log-path blocker; `memory/app-marketing/glow-metrics-source-YYYY-MM-DD.md` documents source, access status, collection command/process, and weekly scoreboard fields.

References:
- memory/app-marketing/account-map.json
- memory/app-marketing/web-analytics-mapping-template.md
- memory/app-marketing/weekly-scoreboard.md
- memory/app-marketing/metrics-automation-plan.md
- memory/app-marketing/app-registry.md

Guardrail: Do not ask JT for daily manual metrics; weekly fallback only if API/log access is blocked.
tasks.reason: Glow should not receive social volume until there is a way to measure visits/searches/clicks and learn from it.

tasks.title: Action Arena: create waitlist/landing-page spec before marketing automation
tasks.description:
First action: Draft a landing/waitlist spec for Action Arena with positioning, fake-money guardrails, beta CTA, and minimum fields to capture.

Why it matters: Action Arena should build demand through @dynastyjig, but the OS needs somewhere to send interested users before directory/SEO tasks make sense.

Done looks like: A build-ready spec is saved at `memory/app-marketing/action-arena-waitlist-spec-YYYY-MM-DD.md` and a follow-up build task exists if needed.

References:
- memory/app-marketing/app-registry.md
- memory/app-marketing/seo-backlog.md
- skills/sports-gm/SKILL.md

Guardrail: No real-money wagering claims; emphasize fake budget, strategy, competition, and no real money is wagered.
tasks.reason: Action Arena should build demand through @dynastyjig, but the OS needs somewhere to send interested users before directory/SEO tasks make sense.

tasks.title: Action Arena: add @dynastyjig signal capture to app marketing scoreboard
tasks.description:
First action: Map @dynastyjig post metrics and reply signals into the App Marketing weekly scoreboard without making product mentions public by default.

Why it matters: Action Arena demand is currently invisible backdrop; the OS needs to detect whether betting/fantasy strategy content is producing beta-user signal.

Done looks like: Scoreboard has Action Arena fields for @dynastyjig engagement, qualified replies, waitlist signups once live, and beta-interest notes.

References:
- memory/app-marketing/weekly-scoreboard.md
- memory/app-marketing/app-registry.md
- memory/sports-gm/

Guardrail: Do not conflate Action Arena with Dynasty Fantasy Football Simulator.
tasks.reason: Action Arena demand is currently invisible backdrop; the OS needs to detect whether betting/fantasy strategy content is producing beta-user signal.

tasks.title: App Marketing OS: implement weekly self-improvement decision rules
tasks.description:
First action: Add a weekly review step that reads metrics + experiment calendar + generated MC task outcomes and outputs continue/kill/rework decisions per app/channel.

Why it matters: Autonomy without kill/continue rules becomes stale task spam. The OS needs to stop dead channels and double down on evidence.

Done looks like: A self-improvement rule file exists and the weekly App Marketing review prompt/script references it before generating new tasks.

References:
- memory/app-marketing/os-spec.md
- memory/app-marketing/weekly-scoreboard.md
- memory/app-marketing/experiment-calendar.md

Guardrail: Never auto-increase volume when metrics are missing for 2 consecutive weeks; fix measurement first.
tasks.reason: Autonomy without kill/continue rules becomes stale task spam. The OS needs to stop dead channels and double down on evidence.
